comment: ; Circular interpolation with I/J/K arc-centre offsets and the CR= radius form.
; I, J, K (arc-centre offsets, relative to the start point) and CR (arc radius)
; are interpolation parameters: per-block values emitted like axes, but not
; axes (no TRANS offset) and not forward-filled - each belongs only to the
; arc block that programs it, so a following linear move has empty I/J/K/CR.
